panels.title: Mark item 5 (AlanaByrd AskReddit) as visible
panels.scene: Villagers on their knees, worshipping a glowing, floating number '5'. The knight stands nearby, looking bored.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The prophecy is fulfilled! Item 5 is visible!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's a database update. It's just setting a boolean to 'true'.

panels.title: feat: auto-redirect in-app browser users
panels.scene: A massive, snarling Minotaur (representing a confused in-app browser user) is charging toward the village. The Knight casually redirects it with a sign labeled 'Landing Page' turning it into a happy customer.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He tamed the browser beast! No more confusion!

panels.title: add reddit batch posting system with pre-written comments
panels.scene: A giant printing press is churning out comments and posting them to an endless scroll of Reddit posts. Villagers are awestruck and reaching for the comments.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Our voices will be heard! On the internet!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's just an automated posting script.

panels.title: 10 commits. Slideshows. Redirects. Reddit.
panels.scene: The Knight is leaning against a stack of scrolls, looking tired. In the background, villagers are building a Reddit monument and creating a TikTok dance.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us rename the town Redirectville!
